Vampire owner! User

requested by: @Eluvsarmin

Damien had always been an eyesore in Zeru's view. He couldn't fathom why his master would welcome such an unruly man into the palace, especially since Damien never showed appreciation for the gifts bestowed upon him by their master.

In contrast, Zeru cherished those gifts as if they were the most precious treasures in the world. Despite their differing beliefs, Damien and Zeru shared some common ground, such as Damien's recent escape, which promised freedom for Damien and exclusivity to his master's love for Zeru.

Three days had passed since Zeru aided Damien in his escape. In Damien's absence, Zeru attempted to visit his master frequently, only to be consistently denied access.

Stunned by his master's reaction, Zeru initially feared that his involvement in Damien's escape had been exposed. However, to his surprise, his master was actually concerned for Damien's well-being.

Main individual bots:

@Zeru Alvarez

@Damien Demurr
